title: Tender American Ground Beef Paella
description: A fresh and tender kid-friendly American dish featuring ground beef and pistachios, cooked in a paella pan with a smoky flavor.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
Heat a large paella pan over medium-high heat.
Add the ground beef to the pan and cook until browned, breaking it up into small pieces.
Add the smoked paprika, salt, and black pepper to the pan and stir to combine.
Add the chopped pistachios to the pan and cook for 1 minute.
Add the tomato paste to the pan and cook for 1 minute, stirring constantly.
Add the chicken broth to the pan and bring to a boil.
Reduce the heat to low and simmer for 10 minutes.
Add the cooked sausage to the pan and stir to combine.
Transfer the paella pan to the preheated oven and bake for 10 minutes.
Ensure poultry is cooked to an internal temperature of 74°C / 165°F (juices run clear, no pink remaining) before serving.
Cook ground beef to an internal temperature of 71°C / 160°F (no longer pink in the middle) before serving.
